SECTION_ESTUDIO_HINT_1: Welcome in. Come on in, don't just stand there.
SECTION_ESTUDIO_HINT_2: We're an indie studio from Madrid. We make games that connect with people.
SECTION_ESTUDIO_HINT_3: We come from YellowWorm, Athagon and other adventures. Now we're writing our own.
CTA_CARD_FREEJEFRY_DESC: Our first game. More info coming soon.
ESTUDIO_DETALLE_INTRO: We are three video game enthusiasts based in Madrid. Before BrainWorm we worked at studios like YellowWorm and Athagon, where we gained experience in design, art and programming. Now we bring our own ideas to life.
ESTUDIO_MEMBER_1_PAST: Designer and creative director at YellowWorm. Experience in mechanics design, narrative and project direction. Leads the vision for the games we create.
ESTUDIO_MEMBER_2_PAST: Artist and animator at Athagon. Specialised in characters, environments and art direction. Brings our imagined worlds to life visually.
ESTUDIO_MEMBER_3_PAST: Programmer and technical artist at YellowWorm. Expert in engines, tools and optimisation. Connects art with code so everything runs smoothly.
SECTION_FREEJEFRY_HINT: Our first game. More information coming soon.
FREEJEFRY_DETALLE_DESC: A game full of adventures. Stay tuned for future updates.
FJ_HERO_TITLE: JEFRY NEEDS YOUR HELP TO ESCAPE
FJ_HERO_INTRO_1: In the dark and gloomy floating castle-dungeon of the wicked King Yobtar, hundreds of prisoners are subjected to the most terrible tortures and mental experiments with the aim of turning them into the one thing the king doesn't have: a true friend.
FJ_HERO_INTRO_2: No one enters willingly and no one has ever escaped... until now.
FJ_HERO_INTRO_3: Jefry, a small and brave forest goblin, has recently been kidnapped and doesn't plan on staying long. Use your skill and wit to help him escape and be free again!
FJ_EL_JUEGO_1: Free Jefry is an adventure and mystery game that blends the best of the great genres. Not only will we explore the castle like in a metroidvania, unlocking new abilities and disguises to access forbidden areas, but we'll also solve puzzles in classic point-and-click style: combining objects and talking to eccentric characters who've lost what little sanity they had.
FJ_EL_JUEGO_2: We'll dodge traps and enemies that push our platforming skills to the limit and have to overcome the hardest and most extreme minigames ever created. Do you think you can help Jefry escape the castle? Now you can prove it!
FJ_QUIENES_1: BrainWorm is an indie studio based in Madrid, made up of 3 passionate gamers who work tirelessly to bring you everything that crazy worm in our heads imagines. We enjoy every phase of the project: from paper design to you playing it at home.
FJ_QUIENES_2: We love designing characters and bringing them to life, building their world and atmosphere, creating traps, enemies, objects and disguises. Composing music and sound and visual effects, dialogue and quests... Mixing it all with endless hours of programming and lots of humour, and there we have it: an epic and absurd adventure that will put to the test anyone brave enough to overcome it.
FJ_QUIENES_3: We're not starting from scratch—we've spent our whole lives in this world, and separately we've worked at studios like Athagon and YellowWorm. Now united we're stronger and have the perfect balance of skills and knowledge needed to tackle our tough mission: becoming a great video game studio!
FJ_POR_QUE_1: After 2 years of development, the game is at an optimal point: we have all the basic ingredients and pillars we needed. Now we just need to finish what we started, and for that we need the community's help to give it that final push.
FJ_POR_QUE_2: We've created a demo that's already available to play, where you can experience the foundations of the game. After that, you decide: in your hands lies whether Jefry can escape the castle and BrainWorm Studio can fulfil its dream of publishing its first video game and continue developing all those ideas living in our minds.
FJ_MECANICAS_INTRO: To explore the castle and find the way out you'll have to prove your worth in different genres: platforming, metroidvania, graphic adventure, minigames... By learning or acquiring different objects and abilities you'll progress through the dungeon:
FJ_MEC_HABILIDADES: Passive abilities: Jefry will learn different techniques like double jump, sliding, stomping...
FJ_MEC_DISFRACES: Disguises: You can wear different outfits that grant powers while worn or let you access forbidden areas, like the diver suit (longer underwater breathing), the pirate suit to join their crew, or the guard suit to fool them (even if it's way too big for you).
FJ_MEC_OBJETOS: Objects: You'll find or be given different items throughout the story. You can combine them to create absurd objects that might help someone or fix broken mechanisms.
FJ_MEC_ALIMENTOS: Food: To survive you can scavenge food found in the castle to restore health. Some is delicious like hot dogs or donuts... others not so much, like expired yoghurts or cockroach skewers.
FJ_MEC_AMIGOS: Adventure friends: You'll also meet characters who decide to follow you. You can use them to access places you couldn't reach alone. For example, the angry fairy gives you light for the darkest areas, and the violent gnome can reach the tiniest corridors and rooms.
FJ_JEFRY_1: He's the small protagonist of the game. A friendly and brave green goblin who was peacefully fishing one day when he was suddenly captured and locked in a gloomy floating castle. He doesn't know why he's there, he's scared and on top of that they left him in his underwear... but he won't give up until he sees the sunlight again and returns to his beloved forest.
FJ_JEFRY_2: Although Jefry is very skilled, he'll gradually learn new techniques that let him access castle areas he couldn't before. He'll dress in strange costumes to enter forbidden places. He'll help other prisoners who in turn help him, and he'll dodge deadly traps and enemies out to defeat him.
FJ_JEFRY_3: A character like you've never met before, an anti-hero who'll surprise you, especially because he doesn't attack or destroy—he uses his brain and agility to overcome obstacles, and thanks to his kindness and good heart he'll win over everyone he meets, in and out of the game.
FJ_CASTILLO_1: It's a great maze full of traps, surprises, dangers and enemies, but also prisoners who want to be free someday. All spread across different biomes: caves, forgotten cells, torture room, construction zone for castle expansion, machine room to keep it floating, abandoned mines, kitchens, the king's game room where he psychologically tortures prisoners (because he's really annoying!) etc.
FJ_CASTILLO_2: Endless levels and environments you'll discover as you explore and advance through the story and the hundreds of subplots unfolding within its walls. Dare to enter the castle? It's pretty scary, fair warning...
FJ_REY: You Will Be My Friend, That's the Law
FJ_REY_1: The ruthless King Yobtar longs for what he's never had: a true friend. Since birth no one paid him attention, not even his parents, who left him abandoned in his huge castle to go on holiday. Bit by bit he forged his strident and childish personality; no one likes him, and that's why he locks people up and forces them to be his friends whether they want to or just pretend to, to feel a shred of freedom.
FJ_REY_2: Among other tortures and horrible things, he forces them to play his favourite games and lose on purpose, to laugh at his jokes, to agree with him in every conversation and nod with their heads down. He celebrates his birthday every day and forces everyone to make him a cake and sing him a custom song. He has his own zoo (where prisoners dress up as exotic animals). He's kidnapped so many people they no longer fit and he's doing expansion works... a real lunatic who needs to be stopped!
FJ_ENEMIGOS_1: In exchange for a salary based on cheese balls, the King has gathered a whole army of Rats who act at his will (though they're also a bit lazy or don't work too hard because they think their pay is too low). There are different Guard Rats of different levels, each with their attacks and ways to defeat them. They're bad because it's their job, and they won't hesitate to chase you and send you back to your cell.
FJ_ENEMIGOS_2: We'll also encounter all kinds of bloodthirsty beasts and critters that will want to eat you: bats, worms, spiders, dogs, piranhas... even ghosts!
FJ_ENEMIGOS_3: And that's not all: you'll also have to face the most dangerous and bloodthirsty bosses the king has recruited, and for those you'll need all your skill and brain to overcome them. Among them are the Master of Tortures, the bitter minstrel, the toad wizard or the great machine that runs the castle engine, among others...
FJ_AMIGOS_1: So many people have been kidnapped by the king that the castle is packed—no one else fits until the expansion works are done. Some prisoners have been there longer than they can remember, others are tortured day and night until they admit they like the king, others are crazy and others, wishing to feel at least a bit of light on their skin, have signed the king's friend contract, which forces them to do whatever he wants.
FJ_AMIGOS_2: Jefry, on the other hand, will make friends through his good deeds and intentions. You'll learn the stories that brought all the prisoners to the castle and how they've lived during their stay. It won't be easy to get along with them—those who aren't crazy are bitter or don't want to defy the king. Talk to them and help with their everyday problems while they help you by trading items or revealing secret paths.
FJ_AMIGOS_3: There's a host of prisoners waiting to meet you: the crazy old man with no memory, the giant who runs a cat nursery, the terrified gnomes, the pirates who smuggle, the engineer who designed the floating system that keeps the castle in the air, or the young man who talks to a sock in his hand... Meet them all and try not to end up like them!
FJ_CONTRIBUIR_1: Now that you know everything about the game, you can try it by downloading our demo. It's in your hands to decide Jefry's future and that of the castle's inhabitants.
FJ_CONTRIBUIR_2: We want you to feel part of the project, as much yours as ours. You can make a donation or contribute to our crowdfunding campaign—any help is welcome so together we can achieve our goal: creating the most epic adventure ever told.
FJ_REWARD_10: €10 - Name in the credits: Your name will appear in the game credits in our Friends of Honour frame.
FJ_REWARD_15: €15 - Copy of Free Jefry: You'll receive a copy of Free Jefry to play the full adventure you helped create.
FJ_REWARD_25: €25 - Caricature: We'll make a digital drawing of your caricature or whoever you want in the Free Jefry world style.
FJ_REWARD_35: €35 - Free Jefry digital artbook: We'll send you the digital book with all Free Jefry art—characters, enemies and art in general.
SECTION_DESARROLLO_HINT: We offer various development services. Click on each card for more information.
DEV_SVC_1_MICRO: We take your game from idea to something you can play.
DEV_SVC_1_DESC: We develop complete video games or integrate into your team to finish projects in progress. We cover design, programming, art and production, adapting each phase to the project's needs. We work with Unity, Unreal and Godot, and prioritise gameplay and user experience.
DEV_SVC_1_PROC1: We follow a flexible pipeline: preproduction, production and post-launch. We adapt to your tools and conventions.
DEV_SVC_1_PROC2: Partial deliverables for continuous validation. Playable builds from early stages so you see progress.
DEV_SVC_2_MICRO: Reinforcements when your project needs them.
DEV_SVC_2_DESC: We support studios that need technical or artistic help to move faster. We integrate into your team, respect your pipeline and bring experience in design, programming or art. Ideal for crunch periods or covering areas where you need extra capacity.
DEV_SVC_2_PROC1: We work with your tools and repositories. Smooth communication and deliverables aligned with your sprints or milestones.
DEV_SVC_2_PROC2: Agile methodology: we adapt to your pace and ceremonies. Daily, planning and review according to your practices.
DEV_SVC_3_MICRO: Turn an idea into something playable.
DEV_SVC_3_DESC: We create quick prototypes to validate mechanics, pitch to investors or publishers, or prepare crowdfunding campaigns. Within weeks you'll have something playable that lets you test the core loop and make informed decisions about the next step.
DEV_SVC_3_PROC1: Fast iterations: something playable every week. We prioritise feedback and idea validation over visual polish.
DEV_SVC_3_PROC2: Deliverables as downloadable build or web playable. Ready to present at events or send to partners.
DEV_SVC_4_MICRO: Characters, worlds and visual style with identity.
DEV_SVC_4_DESC: We design art for video games: characters, environments, props and art direction. We define the project's visual style, create concept art and final assets optimised for the engine. 2D, 2.5D or 3D depending on the project's needs.
DEV_SVC_4_PROC1: We define a style guide and coherent colour palette. References and mood boards to align vision from the start.
DEV_SVC_4_PROC2: Assets optimised for Unity, Unreal or Godot: LODs, atlases, rigging where needed. Ready to integrate into the game.
DEV_SVC_5_DESC: We create rigs, shaders, tools and pipelines that connect artistic work with the game engine. We implement particle systems, visual effects, custom materials and tools for artists. We make art look great and perform well in real time.
DEV_SVC_5_PROC1: Shader Graph, Amplify or HLSL code. In-editor tools to speed up art and animation workflows.
DEV_SVC_5_PROC2: Scene, draw call and memory optimisation. Profiling and recommendations to maintain good performance.
DEV_SVC_6_DESC: We design and develop modern websites for studios, creative projects and companies that want to stand out. A good site conveys the project's essence: we use animations, careful typography and layouts that grab attention. Responsive, accessible and optimised.
DEV_SVC_6_PROC1: Design centred on the project's identity. Wireframes, mockups and prototypes before moving to code.
DEV_SVC_6_PROC2: Modern stack: Angular, React or vanilla HTML/CSS depending on scale. Deployment on Firebase, Vercel or your hosting.
DEV_SVC_7_MICRO: Learn to create games from the inside.
DEV_SVC_7_DESC: Practical training in real development tools and processes. Programming with Godot, art pipelines and gameplay design. Theory and practice sessions with projects students take from idea to playable. For beginners or to expand specific skills.
DEV_SVC_7_PROC1: Hands-on approach: more code and practice than slides. Each session ends with something playable on screen.
DEV_SVC_7_PROC2: Adaptable curriculum: from programming basics to level design, AI or monetisation. Tailored to the group's level.
DEV_SVC_8_DESC: Courses focused on preparing optimised art for video games using Blender. Low-poly and high-poly modelling, retopology, UVs, map baking and export to Unity or Unreal. Professional workflows so your assets are ready to integrate into the engine.
DEV_SVC_8_PROC1: Workflow from Blender to engine: naming, scales, pivots and material setup.
DEV_SVC_8_PROC2: Correct FBX/glTF export. PBR textures, LODs and tri count recommendations by asset type.
SECTION_MERCHAN_HINT: Official BrainWorm Studios products. T-shirts, mugs, figures and more.
SECTION_CONTACTO_QUESTION: Would you like to get in touch with us?
